name: GitLab repositories should not have open high or critical SAST alerts
description: Repositories with open high or critical GitLab SAST vulnerabilities
body:
### Security intent

This control flags repositories where GitLab reports open high or critical SAST vulnerabilities.

### Assessment context

GitLab SAST findings identify potentially vulnerable code paths. Cyscale imports GitLab vulnerability metadata during connector sync and assesses the repository as failing while one or more high or critical SAST vulnerabilities remain detected or confirmed.
remediationDescription:
## Remediation

Review the SAST vulnerability in GitLab, fix the vulnerable code path, and merge the remediation through the normal merge request workflow. Dismiss only false positives or accepted risks with a documented reason.
